faq.title: FAQ & Help
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products and services
faq.telegramDescription: You can contact our support team through the Telegram bot. Follow these steps:
telegramSteps: Go to the bot @atomcheats_bot (click to copy username to clipboard)
Launch the bot using the START button
Click on the button to create a new ticket
faq.discordDescription: You can also contact our support team through our Discord server. Follow these steps:
discordSteps: Join our Discord server using the link below
Verify your account on the server
Go to the support channel and create a ticket
faq.softwareDescription: Download and install the necessary software for our products to work correctly:

drivers.name: Microsoft Visual C++ 2005-2019
drivers.description: Required for running applications developed with Visual C++

drivers.name: DirectX 12
drivers.description: Required for graphics and multimedia applications

drivers.name: NVIDIA Drivers
drivers.description: Latest drivers for NVIDIA graphics cards

drivers.name: AMD Drivers
drivers.description: Latest drivers for AMD graphics cards

protection.name: Disable Windows Defender
protection.description: Tool to disable Windows Defender (password: sordum)

protection.name: How to disable Secure Boot: RU / EN
protection.description: Video tutorial on disabling Secure Boot in Russian and English

protection.name: How to enable UEFI: RU / EN
protection.description: Guide on enabling UEFI mode in Russian and English
